user_query: My family and I are planning a vacation and we want to attend an NHL game during our trip. Can you provide me with the game schedule for the dates we will be in the city, including the teams playing, the venue, and the start time of each game? Additionally, I would like to know the team roster information for the home team and the away team for the game we plan to attend. Please provide the player names, positions, and jersey numbers for both teams.

TaskList.description: Obtain the NHL game schedule for the specified dates in the city.
Extract the details of the NHL games, including teams, venue, and start time for the specified dates.
Identify the specific game to attend based on the schedule obtained in the previous tasks.
Gather roster information for the home team and the away team for the chosen game.
Compile player names, positions, and jersey numbers for both teams from the roster information.
